mission.title: crossplane: Implement multiple-source-field patch type
mission.description:
### Description of your changes
This PR adds a new patch type, `FromManyCompositeFieldPaths`, which accepts a list of composite field paths.

When the patch is applied, these multiple values are retrieved from the composite. If any value cannot be retrieved, the patch is aborted.

The `Transform` system has been modified to allow Transforms to run on multiple values. Standard transforms will output the same number of values as they are passed.

The `String` transform will now take any number of input values and output a single value. This is backwards compatible with 1.0.

Existing tests pass given the Transform modifications to process multiple values. Additional tests have been added for testing the multi input patch type and the string transform multiple input to single output.

### TODO
- [x] Add tests for multi-patch value retrieval
- [x] Add tests for multi-transform functionality
- [ ] Document added functionality (can work on this in combination with #2128) as 'advanced composi

resolution.summary:
### Description of your changes

This implements a `FromConstantValue` patch type for compositions. 

Fixes #2013 : "Add ConstantValue patch in composition" 

I have:

- [X] Read and followed Crossplane's [contribution process].
- [X] Run `make reviewable test` to ensure this PR is ready for review.

### How has this code been tested

I have created a Composition test at https://github.com/stevendborrelli/composition-examples/tree/main/FromConstantValuePatch and tested it against a 1.2.1 Crossplane build.

This results in a DB being created with the properties:
```yaml
apiVersion: database.gcp.crossplane.io/v1beta1
kind: CloudSQLInstance
metadata:
  annotations:
    crossplane.io/composition-resource-name: cloudsqlinstance
    crossplane.io/external-name: cv-test-db-tbzwp-x2dqn
    test.crossplane.io/constant-value: constant annotation
  creationTimestamp: "2021-05-07T18:19:04Z"
  finalizers:
  - finalizer.managedresource.crossplane.io
  generateName: cv-test-db-tbzwp-
  generation: 4
  labels:
    crossplane.io/claim-name: cv-test-db
    crossplane.io/claim-namespace: default
    crossplane.io/composite: cv-test-db-tbzwp
  name: cv-test-db-tbzwp-x2dqn
  ownerReferences:
  - apiVersion: database.example.org/v1alpha1
    controller: true
    kind: CompositePostgreSQLInstance
    name: cv-test-db-tbzwp
    uid: acd55391-8df9-4f69-835a-e12f8b17371c
  resourceVersion: "266474"
  uid: 096bb318-caac-4c80-9a0f-e0c6c0f1ee18
spec:
  forProvider:
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_9_6
    g
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: example.org/v1alpha1 
kind: Test
metadata:
  name: test-one
  annotations:
    woo: lalala
  labels:
    label: test
spec:
  parameters:
    fieldOne: one
    fieldTwo: two

# Create XRD with some default source values
apiVersion: apiextensions.crossplane.io/v1
kind: CompositeResourceDefinition
metadata:
  name: compositetests.example.org
spec:
  group: example.org
  names:
    kind: CompositeTest
    plural: compositetests
  claimNames:
    kind: Test
    plural: tests
  defaultCompositionRef:
    name: test
  versions:
    - name: v1alpha1
      referenceable: true
      served: true
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:
          type: object
          properties:
            spec:
              type: object
              properties:
                parameters:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    fieldOne:
                      type: string
                    fieldTwo:
                      type: string
              required:
                - parameters

apiVersion: apiextensions.crossplane.io/v1
kind: Composition
metadata:
  name: test 
spec:
  compositeTypeRef:
    apiVersion: example.org/v1alpha1
    kind: CompositeTest
  patchSets:
    - name: Metadata
      patches:
      - fromFieldPath: metadata.labels
      - fromFieldPath: metadata.labels["crossplane.io/claim-namespace"]
        toFieldPath: metadata.namespace

    - name: Parameters
      patches:
      - type: FromMultipleCompositeFieldPaths
        # Retrieve two values from XRD parameters
        fromMultipleFieldPaths: 
          - spec.parameters.fieldOne
          - spec.parameters.fieldTwo
        toFieldPath: metadata.annotations["description"]
        transforms:
          # Map each field value to another value
          # ["one","two"] -> ["1","2"]
          - type: map
            map:
              one: "1"
              two: "2"

          # Format all values into a single output
          # ["1","2"] -> "Field One: 31 - Field Two: 32"
          - type: combine
            combine:
              type: string
              string:
                fmt: "Field One: %x - Field Two: %x"

  resources:
    - base:
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret # Lazy testing, should not use native resources
        metadata:
          namespace:
        type: kubernetes.io/opaque
        data: {}
      patches:
        - type: PatchSet
          patchSetName: Metadata
        - type: PatchSet
          patchSetName: Parameters
